immutable_core.semantic_definition: One positive state episode row per target entity interval when the example state is active.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Same-name assets must preserve the active-state scope and positive-only interpretation.

state_episode_contract.episode_start_rule: start at approved source active-state interval start
state_episode_contract.episode_end_rule: end at approved source active-state interval end
state_episode_contract.continuity_rule: use approved source interval boundaries unless a mapping-specific union rule is explicitly approved
state_episode_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained positive state episode under the approved source-status inclusion rule
